title.en: Ye Tian also went in directly.

content.en:
Time passed slowly, and the hurricane inside the hurricane sea was completely subsided.

Whew!!

One after another Origin Upper Realm Overlords have entered the Hurricane Sea, without that kind of hurricane with special power, the Hurricane Sea is just an ordinary sea, and it will not pose a threat to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord at all.

In an instant, these Origin Upper Realm Overlords came to an abyss entrance, which was transformed by the mouth of the Origin Ancestor.

But now, from the outside, there are no traces of corpses, and this is already a huge treasure world.

Many Origin Upper Realm Overlords did not hesitate at all, and shuttled directly into it.

It was not the first time that many Origin Upper Realm Overlords had entered, so they were naturally not afraid, they still had some understanding of the situation inside.

Ye Tian also went in directly.

......

"What a terrible coercion!"

Ye Tian felt an unimaginable aura, this aura made him feel a heavy pressure here, and even his perception couldn't extend far, and it was difficult to exert his strength.

He stood here motionless, and after a while, he was able to control his body a little so that he would not make a mistake in the middle of the battle.

At this time.

The other Origin Upper Realm Overlords have all left, but each Origin Upper Realm Overlord has chosen a different route.

There are many lines and passages here, all of which seem to be passages made of veins, as if there is no end in sight.

Ye Tian chose a passage and flew over.

Subsequently.

He found a cave and began to copy his body inside, so that even if he fell, he could continue to copy his body and continue to explore this treasure world.

Soon.

If the copy of the body is successful, you will use this copy body to act and explore this treasure world.

"Near the entrance, there shouldn't be many resources, they must have been scraped by the previous Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, even if they are bred again this time, their number will definitely be scarce, there is no need to spend too much time!"

He has limited time now, so he can't afford to delay here.

He didn't even want to delay the time of copying, and directly copied another copy body, if the previous copy body fell, this one could directly follow.

Ye Tian shuttled quickly, and he didn't care about the danger.

Soon.

His body passed through a membrane and fell into a black sea of blood, which was directly melted.

Replica Body Fall.

"That place is in danger!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Actually, if he was careful and used various methods to explore, he wouldn't have fallen in, but he didn't want to waste time, so he fell.

Subsequently.

His second replica body moved forward again, but this time bypassing the place.

In this way, Ye Tian explored again and again, and finally went deep into this treasure world.

At this time, he began to slowly explore this place, looking for resources and treasures.

Soon, he saw a blood-red crystalline substance, emitting a dazzling light and containing terrifying energy.

"Origin Blood Crystal!"

Ye Tian recognized it at a glance, flew over directly, and put away this Origin Blood Crystal.

Just one Origin Blood Crystal didn't help, but it was a good start.

After that, Ye Tian continued to search in this area and found various resources, but most of them were not as good as the Origin Blood Crystal.

this day.

Ye Tian was lucky and found a piece of immortal blood gold.

"This is the Immortal Blood Gold!"

Ye Tian stared at the somewhat irregular blood-colored metal in his hand, which had countless wonderful patterns on it, which was really beautiful.

He pinched it with his hand, but he couldn't shake this piece of immortal blood gold.

"Sure enough, it's tough, although I didn't use much strength, but this kind of power is not a problem to pinch an ordinary Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, but it can't crush a piece of indestructible blood gold, which is worthy of creating a reincarnation treasure!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He put away the piece of immortal blood gold, then sent the resources to another replica body, and continued to search.

Due to the large number of replica bodies, coupled with the huge size of this treasure world, he was not afraid of being discovered by other Origin Upper Realm Overlords, so he made another replica body and continued to explore deeply, maybe there would be more resources in the deeper places!

In this way, he can also hope to get a greater opportunity.

Time passes.

Ye Tian obtained more and more good things, such as the Origin Blood Crystal, but the Immortal Blood Gold was very rare, and he didn't find it after that.

......

"This is ......"

Ye Tian came to a rift, this rift seemed to tear everything apart, this was not born naturally, but a rift torn by a force, which could not be dissipated after countless years.

If the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords were here, they would know what this rift was.

The Origin Ancestor failed to impact the higher realm and died directly, and his physical body still touched the higher realm in half a step, but his body was also wiped out by a terrifying force, and his physical body was shattered, with many cracks inside.

And this rift is one of them, which is still preserved today.

"This rift contains a terrifying power, if I get close, I'm afraid I will be beaten to pieces and killed directly!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Still, he's ready to give it a try.

He directly urged the body of reincarnation Haotian, and the origin of the other side of the whole body was stimulated, and only then did he get close to this rift.

Suddenly.

He seemed to echo with the power of the rift, creating a kind of resonance that caused the force to hurt him drastically.

At this moment, although he was suffering a terrifying impact, he would not die.

"This crack actually echoes my reincarnation Haotian body, could it be that the Origin Ancestor is also the reincarnation Haotian Body of cultivation, which caused me not to be killed? But it shouldn't be that simple, after all, the Origin Ancestor was also killed by this rift!"

Ye Tian didn't understand a little, but he didn't think too much about it.

He continued to go deeper and came to a piece of heaven and earth under the rift, which also belonged to the place where the Origin Ancestor's body was incarnated, but it was occupied by the rift, causing other Origin Upper Realm overlords not to dare to approach here, otherwise they would be wiped out by the terrifying power contained in this rift.

"This is the !! of indestructible blood"

Ye Tian was shocked when he saw pieces of immortal blood gold.

This position should be a bone of the Origin Ancestor, and the broken bones gave birth to pieces of immortal blood gold, and no one took them, so he was cheaper.

"Hahaha, with so much immortal blood gold, there should be hope to create a reincarnation treasure!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
